dialogos.texto_en: So beautiful...\nIt's like we're actually inside the sea...
It really is.\nWith an aquarium this big,\nthe fish can swim freely.
Ichika-san, look! There's a manta ray!\nIt's swimming and dancing\nlike it's fluttering!
Really, so that's how manta rays swim.\nHow interesting.
Wow! A whale shark!\nIt's coming this way!
Woaaah, what a sight to behold!
I thought it would be scary because it's so big,\nbut looking at it closely,\nit's kind of cute, isn't it?
I...don't really get the cute part,\nbut it's surprisingly charming.
It's amazing to see a whale shark\nswim so effortlessly...
I didn't expect the aquarium to be this big.\nIt's beyond imagination.\nAnd there are so many living creatures here.
It's like they cut out a piece of the sea\nand put it on display.
It's like taking a walk under the ocean.
That's a good way to put it, Nino.
Huh? What is?
'Cut out a piece of the sea.'\nThe concept of Churaumi Aquarium is to\ndisplay the Okinawan sea as it is.
This tank is built to replicate the territorial waters\nsurrounding the island, even the Kuroshio current!
W-wow.\nReally?
However, the technology\nthat makes this kind of display possible\nis truly impressive.
I've heard that the acrylic glass for the tanks\nis 60 centimeters thick.\nIt can support 7,500 tons of seawater.
...Wooow.
By the way, there's a sample of the acrylic glass\ndisplayed over there! You guys should go take a look, you'll be amazed by the thickness!
Um, Fu-kun?\nYeah, that's amazing, but we don't care about that right now.
Ooh...\nTh-that so.
You should try to read the room a little better.
(Teehee...\n But it's so Futaro.)
At the very least,\nthat kind of talk is a no-go on a date.
A d-date, you say...
Uesugi-kun, you should learn a bit more\nabout the heart of a maiden.
Ugh...\nWell, maybe you're right about that...
(A date...)
(Could it be, that's why...\n Futaro wanted to come to the aquarium?)
Hey hey, Miku.
WHA?!\nWhat, Yotsuba?
Why don't you talk to Uesugi-san more?\nWhile we're looking at the tanks!
O-okay...
Ah! Hey, big bro, you can also see\nthis aquarium from above.\nLook, there's a guide here.
Oh, a water deck.\nThis is also quite an interesting exhibit.
There seem to be many other attractions left,\nso shall we have some free time?\nLet's meet up back here later.
Yeah.\nThere's no need for everyone\nto be sticking together.
I'm going to the water deck!
Then, I'll go with you.
Me too-!
Miku, do your best!
(I...actually, wanna be with Futaro.)
Miku.
Hya?!\nF-Futaro...
Why don't we stay here and look a little longer?
Huh?!\nUm, um...
Oh? Finally making a move, huh?
Hey, Nino, how about we go look at the tropical fish?
Sure, let's go.\nSee you later, then, Fu-kun.
(Everyone's gone!\n It's just me and Futaro!)
(W-w-w-what should I do?\n Did everyone leave on purpose...?\n Wh-what am I gonna do!)
Wha...
(N-no, Futaro's getting closer!\n Why, why is he coming over here?!)
...Miku?
Wha%p-2;――%p;?! What is it?!
Well, um...\nif you want to see the other aquariums,\nshould we move on?
N-no, it's okay here.
But you haven't really been looking at the tank,\nhave you?
Th-that's because...
If you don't like being with me..
I like it!
Ah! Um... Sorry.\nI guess it's not okay to shout loudly at the aquarium.
Y-yeah, that's right.\nLet's watch quietly.
(That's right, I like being with him.)
(Being with Futaro like this makes me feel\n so happy.)
(When I'm next to him, I feel so calm.\n It's very relaxing.)
(But it's strange...)
(On one side,\n I feel worried that he'll become a wolf,\n but I also feel relaxed when I'm with him.)
(Both of these opposing feelings exist in my heart.)
(I don't know what to do.\n I don't know, but...\n I want to be by Futaro's side.)
(Futaro also thinks it's okay\n for me to be by his side.)
(Even then...)
(Love is really, so difficult...)
Miku.
Hey, about what happened today.\nI asked everyone to change our destination,\nremember?
That's because I wanted to come here with you.
!...\nThat means...
...The aquarium is an important place\nfor you and I, Miku.
(Just as I thought. That's why Futaro\n wanted to be here with me...)
(It's a place where we shared fond memories)
...The place where I confessed to you.
Yeah.
It's not like going back to the old ways or anything, but...\nI thought I could talk to you here.
...Talk?
During this trip, you've been avoiding me, haven't you?
Ah...
I don't understand why you're doing that, Miku.\nI'm sorry.
Well...
(Even though Futaro is not at fault!)
(...Wait? Am I wrong?\n Is it wrong to be unclear whether\n Futaro's a wolf or not?)
(But, that makes it sound like I'm hoping that he's a wolf,\nwhen I dont know for sure yet.)
(I might be expecting too much, though.)
(Ahhh, I don't understand anymore.\n Love is really difficult...)
(That's not it.\n Is it my heart that's difficult...?)
So, I thought about it.
A lot has happened from when you confessed to me\nat the aquarium, Miku, and I confessed my love for you at the school festival.
...Yeah.
During that time, maybe I made you feel anxious, Miku.\nIf that's the case, I want you to tell me.
...What?
Miku.\nMy feelings haven't changed\nsince I confessed to you.
...Mine haven't changed either.
My feelings for you, Futaro.\nThey haven't changed all this time.
Is that so. Thanks.
No.\nIt's me who should apologize for making you worry.
(...That's right.\n At that time, Futaro told me\n that I was a special person to him.)
(If that's the case...\n He'll definitely tell me properly\n before he becomes a wolf.)
(He'll definitely wait for me until I feel ready to accept him.)
(It's strange of me to be afraid of boys being a wolf.)
(It's just so nice and relaxing being with him.)
(Even though being together with my sisters\n is important, being next to Futaro\n is just as important to me.)
(Because they've all let me stay here with him)
(And, Futaro wants me next to him...)
